channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Popular sugar substitutes linked to faster brain aging
item.description: Adults consuming high amounts of artificial sweeteners showed significantly faster brain aging, a study suggests.

item.title: Earth's biggest volcanic event transformed an entire oceanic plate
item.description: Seismic waves show the oceanic plate under the Ontong Java Plateau was dramatically altered by massive volcanic activity.

item.title: A shattered asteroid may have bombarded Earth 800 million years ago
item.description: A catastrophic asteroid breakup may have triggered a huge wave of impacts across the inner solar system about 800 million years ago. The debris was la...

item.title: NASAâs James Webb catches a supermassive black hole feeding
item.description: JWST has captured unusually detailed images of gas feeding the supermassive black hole at the center of NGC 4696. A vast filament appears to funnel ma...
